rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious 'Admin' Local User Creation with Net Command

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious 'Admin' Local User Creation with Net Command
id: 0ce1911b-5038-4ee7-8925-013d808c6c7f
status: experimental
description: Detects creation of a local user account using the net command with 'Admin'
  in the name - this technique is used by Vice Society ransomware gang to create bogus
  user accounts that attempt to blend in with an administrative user account naming
  convention.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/10/25/dev-0832-vice-society-opportunistic-ransomware-campaigns-impacting-us-education-sector/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/11/28
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1136.001
- attack.t1136
- attack.t1078
- attack.t1078.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \net.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - user
    - add
    - adm
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Valid creation of local user accounts with adm in the name (should be rare)
level: high
